title: the SCP
description: a modpack that adds a lot of SCP's to the game you can kill them with guns
body:
This modpack is made to add SCP's to minecraft you can find them in the wild and in structures so you gotta watch out for scps you can make guns to fight the scp's like an ak-47 some of the scp's you can find are:
Gategaurdian
headlights
heart of darknes
and many more
